desc: Opens the Tagging Preferences window for managing auto-tag settings and tag placement rules.
summary: Opens the Tagging Preferences window for managing auto-tag settings and tag placement rules. Uses TaggingPreferencesWindow.ShowSingleton for singleton behaviour.
usecase: User wants to view or edit tagging preferences, auto-tag settings, or tag placement rules.
notfor: Placing individual tags on elements (use Tag commands instead).

thinkingsteps: Loading tag families and placement rules…
